trivia_bullets.text: Art and mechanics directly reference the Evil Queen / Witch from Snow White: hooded figure offering a red apple, cottage setting, and the drain effect literalizes the poisoned-apple trope. Part of ELD's Snow White reference cluster with Glass Casket and Magic Mirror.
sources: WebSearch: ELD flavor inspirations via coolstuffinc.com
WebSearch: ELD Eldraine Flavor Inspirations via mtgnexus.com

trivia_bullets.text: Flavor text: 'Murder clad in crimson beauty, / An end to life and love and duty.' —Barrow witch incantation. Second barrow-witch incantation in ELD (alongside Reave Soul no. 103), both dark rhyming verse — a deliberate flavor micro-cycle across ELD's black common slot.

One of ELD's introductory Food-token cards. Tempting Witch flips the Food from life-gain to life-loss via activated ability — the Food becomes an instrument of harm rather than healing, mechanically inverting its default function.
EDHREC rank 16,075. Appears in Food-matters and lifegain-drain Commander strategies. Not a Constructed staple.

related_cards.name: Witch's Oven
related_cards.note: Food-creation artifact; same mechanical ecosystem; Hansel & Gretel / Curious Pair fairy-tale cluster

related_cards.name: Glass Casket
related_cards.note: Snow White reference cycle member in ELD

related_cards.name: Reave Soul
related_cards.note: Shares 'Barrow witch incantation' flavor-text attribution; flavor micro-cycle pair
